title: Custom Loading Screen
description: This adds the ability to customize the loading screen in minecraft through very detailed json files.
body:
This allows customizing the loading screen of minecraft forge 1.12.2 using json files.

This has a fairly complex syntax - most json values can be set to an expression rather than a fixed value to allow highly dynamic loading screens. Please refer to the [wiki]([https://github.com/AlexIIL/CustomLoadingScreen/wiki](https://github.com/AlexIIL/CustomLoadingScreen/wiki)) for a basic overview, and look at the [samples]([https://github.com/AlexIIL/CustomLoadingScreen/tree/1.4.x/src/main/resources/assets/customloadingscreen/sample/config](https://github.com/AlexIIL/CustomLoadingScreen/tree/1.4.x/src/main/resources/assets/customloadingscreen/sample/config)) for examples on working loading screens.

The 1.7.10 version is far more basic - it doesn't support expresions, or most of the syntax mentioned on the wiki. This project also used to be called Better Loading Screen on curseforge, but was renamed to better reflect the mod.

This mod doesn't include an easier way to configure the loading screens - please join [my discord server](https://discord.alexiil.uk/cls) if you are having trouble.
